response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify performers and the song title from on-screen text. 2. Confirmed the song '最強未来衝撃' as an original composition for AZKi's 2026 birthday event. 3. Since no official lyric database contained this new song, I manually transcribed the full on-screen lyrics during the performance and provided a translation. 4. Broken down the video into segments based on song performance and talking.
response.global_summary: AZKi and Takanashi Kiara perform the original song '最強未来衝撃' (Saikyou Mirai Shougeki) live for AZKi's birthday concert, followed by a conversation about the song's creation.

scenes.description: The performer AZKi and Takanashi Kiara begin with a short introduction to their performance, speaking to the audience about their upcoming song.
AZKi and Takanashi Kiara perform the original song '最強未来衝撃'. The performance features choreography and on-screen lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
歌え！この衝動はきっと
抱かれて染まって 振り切って
まだ ほら 立ち上がれ
星を締め付ける
君と絡まって みようか
止まらないよ 最強未来衝撃
ただ ただ ただ
剥がれ落ちてく
広がって
駆け出して
飛んで
だから JUST FLY TO THE STAR
もっと WOW WOW
世界中で PROUDY GLOW
存在など たいして 無い 無い
壊れても 関係ない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Sing! This impulse is surely
Embraced, dyed, and shaken off
Still, look, stand up
Tightening around the stars
Shall we get entangled with you?
It won't stop, strongest future impact
Just, just, just
Falling off
Spreading
Running out
Flying
So JUST FLY TO THE STAR
More WOW WOW
PROUDY GLOW throughout the world
Existence and such, doesn't matter much
Even if it breaks, doesn't matter

scenes.description: The performers transition out of the song and begin a conversational segment, discussing their experience creating the song together for the birthday event.
